_doc: Tier-2 MBA seed buckets derived from Tier2_MBA.csv. Use scripts/seed-job-buckets.ts to apply. Status starts as 'candidate' so they are hidden from non-admin users until validated.

buckets.name: FMCG Territory & Distribution Sales
buckets.nature_of_work: Beat/route management; distributor & retailer relationships; volume/offtake targets; new outlet addition; SSPD metrics

buckets.name: Consumer Durables (FMCD) Field Sales & Ops
buckets.nature_of_work: Dealer & distributor management; channel expansion; in-store visibility; product training; secondary sales planning

buckets.name: B2B Industrial, Specs & Projects Sales
buckets.nature_of_work: Specifications selling to architects, PMCs, and EPC contractors; key account management; project conversion; technical solutioning

buckets.name: Retail Banking — Branch & Relationship Banking
buckets.nature_of_work: Liability/CASA acquisition; cross-sell of loans, cards, and investment products; branch operations support; customer relationship management

buckets.name: Wealth, Insurance & Financial Products RM
buckets.nature_of_work: HNI/NRI/retail wealth acquisition; portfolio advisory across mutual funds, insurance, PMS; investment strategy; cross-sell

buckets.name: Finance, Tax, Audit & Compliance Advisory
buckets.nature_of_work: Tax compliance & advisory; internal audit; SOX/ICFR; statutory audit; risk advisory; assurance

buckets.name: Strategy, Management & Business Consulting
buckets.nature_of_work: Business problem solving; strategy formulation; primary/secondary research; market entry; growth strategy; due diligence

buckets.name: IT Consulting, BPM & Technology Services
buckets.nature_of_work: Process consulting / BPM; ERP/SAP implementations; technology operations; transition; solution design

buckets.name: SaaS / Tech B2B Sales & Business Development
buckets.nature_of_work: Lead generation; product demo & pitching; pipeline management; SaaS account expansion; outbound sales

buckets.name: EdTech Sales, BD & Counselling
buckets.nature_of_work: Inside/outside sales for courses; student counselling; K12 / higher-ed BD; partnership development

buckets.name: HR, Talent Acquisition & People Operations
buckets.nature_of_work: Recruitment & sourcing; HR business partner; comp & benefits coordination; engagement; people operations

buckets.name: Operations, Supply Chain & Logistics
buckets.nature_of_work: Production planning; procurement; inventory management; warehouse & logistics; demand planning; vendor management

buckets.name: Brand, Digital & Growth Marketing
buckets.nature_of_work: Brand strategy & positioning; digital campaigns (SEO/SEM/social); growth marketing; performance marketing; content & creative

buckets.name: Market Research, Analytics & Insights
buckets.nature_of_work: Primary & secondary research; consumer insights; data analytics; reporting; dashboards; consumer behaviour studies

buckets.name: Real Estate Sales, Advisory & Transactions
buckets.nature_of_work: Property sales (residential/commercial); client acquisition; property advisory; transaction support; site visits

buckets.name: General Management Trainee — Manufacturing & Conglomerates
buckets.nature_of_work: Rotational programme across functions (Sales, Ops, HR, Finance); plant exposure; leadership track for diversified conglomerates
